purpose: add_head_function end to end: the registrar validates NOTHING — a wrong-shape njit callable (star_args_stub) registers silently ({'raised': false}) and, unreferenced by any rule head, is inert — while first_clause_first_grounding, named in the rule head's f(X) form, grounds the head variable to its first argument's first grounding and Processed(A):[1,1] derives through reason(). The asymmetry with add_annotation_function's arity gate is the pinned contrast (the same star_args_stub that raises TypeError there registers silently here).
